name: settlemesh
description: Search and invoke the SettleMesh catalog, inspect deployment readiness, and observe existing deployments. Production source deployment is currently unavailable.

interface.shortDescription: Discover capabilities and inspect deployment readiness; new source deployment is unavailable.
interface.longDescription: SettleMesh exposes a capability catalog over MCP/CLI and the intended login, managed-data, and usage-billing deployment contract. Production deployment authorization is currently unavailable: app_deployments.create is disabled and source deploy fails closed with deployment_authorization_unavailable before upload, build, payment, publication, or a live URL. Existing deployment records can still be observed.
defaultPrompt: Deploy this app with SettleMesh, including login, a database, and usage billing.
Show me the SettleMesh capabilities for this task and quote any paid action first.
Turn this agent-built app into a paid product with end-user billing.
